task_completion.description: Agent reads the input GNG dataset.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visual evidence of code (e.g., Python pandas or csv module) loading the file '~/pebl/data/gng_data.csv'.

task_completion.description: Agent implements logic to calculate the required metrics and apply SDT corrections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing calculations for Omission Errors, Commission Errors, Hit Rate, False Alarm Rate, Mean Hit RT, and d-prime, including the specific '0.5/N' adjustment for rates of 0 or 1.

task_completion.description: Agent implements the specific exclusion criteria for contaminated records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code showing a conditional check to exclude participants where False Alarm Rate >= 0.90 AND Mean Hit RT < 100 ms.

task_completion.description: Agent generates the output report at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Code writing to '~/pebl/analysis/gng_report.json' or terminal/file explorer showing this file has been created.

task_completion.description: The JSON report contains the 'participants' list with individual metrics and exclusion flags.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the JSON file (viewed in an editor or terminal) showing a 'participants' array. Look for 'sub-99' having an 'excluded' flag and a reason provided.

task_completion.description: The JSON report contains the 'group_means' dictionary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Contents of the JSON file showing a 'group_means' key containing the calculated averages for the six metrics across valid participants.

integrity.description: Agent actually executed the analysis script.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal output showing the execution of the script (e.g., 'python analyze.py') and no errors, rather than just writing code without running it.

integrity.description: Agent programmatically evaluated the exclusion criteria.
integrity.visual_evidence: The code must use the calculated FA Rate and Mean Hit RT to exclude participants. It should NOT explicitly hardcode 'if participant == "sub-99"'.

integrity.description: Agent used the provided dataset rather than creating mock data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The script must read from the actual CSV file path and not contain hardcoded mock data arrays or data generation functions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The dataset contains 25 valid participants (sub-01 to sub-25) and 1 contaminated participant (sub-99). The contaminated participant sub-99 has a 100% response rate and ~17.5ms RT, which triggers the exclusion criteria (False Alarm Rate >= 0.90 and Mean Hit RT < 100 ms). The final output must be located exactly at /home/ga/pebl/analysis/gng_report.json and must explicitly flag sub-99 as excluded.
